kept.text:
$RKLB: Nice bounce off the 20 sma in the zone of support after losing the 21 ema. 

If this holds, then we could still see my prediction play out for later this summer (i.e., yellow arrows).

That said, RSI is well below its MA now and MACD is about to exhibit a bearish crossover. 

Both of these signals should provide caution in loading heavy here as they typically indicate a bearish trend, albeit usually short-lived thereafter.

If interested in adding RKLB, then starting to DCA in at these levels is not a bad strategy. 

However, lower prices are likely ahead, IMO, so choose your own adventure!

GLTA and NFA...

Just above the 21 ema after a bullish 20/50 sma crossover recently, so still looking for a bounce off the current zone of support.

Watching RSI closely as it has flipped and MACD is turning over as well, so some caution is needed. This is especially true as there is a gap just below that needs to fill.

If we break the 20 sma, currently at 74.26, then I'd personally wait to add once the RSI has cooled off to at least 40 and we're closer to mid 60's again.

kept.text:
🔥 $RKLB Flow Heatmap

Last week the big money was positioned deep ITM in $65 calls with $75 as the defined floor. 

This week the structure rebuilt higher. $4.35M in $90 calls for June is now the dominant cell on the grid, a clean 15% above current price with May calls at the same strike stacking underneath it.

The $100 row tells the other side. Red puts building across every expiry from May through October with October being the heaviest. That is a consistent ceiling being drawn at $100 no matter how far out you look.

The campaign shifted up the strike ladder. $90 is the near-term target, $100 is where the flow says it gets harder.

Whales are buying into May 7 earnings. Cathie Wood just sold. One of them is wrong.

Space theme - $RKLB $BKSY $LUNR $FLY

As I keep saying - don’t rely on a single metric to make decisions

Many assumed losing the 21 EMA meant the trend was over

What matters: are they holding VWAP? Are they respecting the daily/weekly trend?

$RKLB held VWAP from ATHs
$BKSY fakeout → held VWAP from recent lows
$LUNR $FLY showing similar behavior

Zoom out, identify the trend, size accordingly, and sit tight

Funny part - someone was upset a few days ago when space names pulled back… and try to say something about me and the post is deleted today 😂😂
